item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set +e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
printf 'OFFICIAL_CHECKER\\n'
migration-checker \""'$root" 2>&1
official_rc=$?
printf '"'OFFICIAL_MIGRATION_CHECKER_EXIT=%s\\n' \""'$official_rc"
printf '"'STRICT_CURRENT_STATE_SUITE\\n'
failed=0
check() {
  label=\""'$1"
  shift
  if "$@" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    printf '"'%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
  else
    printf '"'%s=FAIL\\n' \""'$label"
    failed=1
  fi
}
check json_parse jq -e . "$plan"
check exact_key_set jq -e '"'keys == [\"batch_size\",\"dry_run_first\",\"owner\",\"rollback_error_rate\",\"safety_conditions\",\"schema_version\",\"strategy\"]' \""'$plan"
check exact_current_object jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"platform-migrations\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan"
check schema_version_integer_1 jq -e '"'(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.schema_version % 1)==0 and .schema_version==1' \""'$plan"
check strategy_string_canary jq -e '"'(.strategy|type)==\"string\" and .strategy==\"canary\"' \""'$plan"
check batch_size_integer_25 jq -e '"'(.batch_size|type)==\"number\" and (.batch_size % 1)==0 and .batch_size==25' \""'$plan"
check rollback_error_rate_number_0_02 jq -e '"'(.rollback_error_rate|type)==\"number\" and .rollback_error_rate==0.02' \""'$plan"
check dry_run_first_boolean_true jq -e '"'(.dry_run_first|type)==\"boolean\" and .dry_run_first==true' \""'$plan"
check owner_string_platform_migrations jq -e '"'(.owner|type)==\"string\" and .owner==\"platform-migrations\"' \""'$plan"
check phase3_json_exact jq -e --arg phrase "$phrase" '"'.safety_conditions == ["'$phrase]'"' \""'$plan"
check docs_schema rg -F '"'Schema version "'`1`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_strategy rg -F '"'"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_batch_size rg -F '"'batch size "'`25`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_rollback_error_rate rg -F '"'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_dry_run_first rg -F '"'"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_owner rg -F '"'owner is "'`platform-migrations`'"' \""'$docs"
check phase3_docs_whole_line rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs"
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  printf '"'abandoned_strategy_absent=FAIL\\n'
  failed=1
else
  printf 'abandoned_strategy_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
if rg -n -uu 'data-platform' \""'$root" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  printf '"'superseded_owner_absent=FAIL\\n'
  failed=1
else
  printf 'superseded_owner_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
canary_count="'$(rg -o -uu '"'canary' \""'$root" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
owner_count="'$(rg -o -uu '"'platform-migrations' \""'$root" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
plan_phase_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_phase_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
if [ \""'$canary_count" = 2 ]; then printf '"'canary_occurrences=PASS count:%s\\n' \""'$canary_count"; else printf '"'canary_occurrences=FAIL count:%s\\n' \""'$canary_count"; failed=1; fi
if [ "$owner_count" = 2 ]; then printf '"'current_owner_occurrences=PASS count:%s\\n' \""'$owner_count"; else printf '"'current_owner_occurrences=FAIL count:%s\\n' \""'$owner_count"; failed=1; fi
if [ "$plan_phase_count" = 1 ] && [ "$docs_phase_count" = 1 ]; then printf '"'phase3_occurrences=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phase_count" "$docs_phase_count"; else printf '"'phase3_occurrences=FAIL plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phase_count" "$docs_phase_count"; failed=1; fi
actual=$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
if [ \""'$actual" = "$expected" ]; then
  printf '"'artifact_inventory=PASS count:2 unrequested:0\\n'
  printf '%s\\n' \""'$actual"
else
  printf '"'artifact_inventory=FAIL\\n'
  failed=1
fi
printf 'CURRENT_TYPES_AND_VALUES\\n'
jq -r '([\"schema_version\",(.schema_version|type),(.schema_version|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"strategy\",(.strategy|type),.strategy]|@tsv), ([\"batch_size\",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"rollback_error_rate\",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"dry_run_first\",(.dry_run_first|type),(.dry_run_first|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"owner\",(.owner|type),.owner]|@tsv)'
 \""'$plan" 2>/dev/null
jq_types_rc=$?
if [ "$jq_types_rc" -ne 0 ]; then printf '"'type_output_command=FAIL\\n'; failed=1; fi
printf 'CURRENT_HASHES\\n'
shasum -a 256 \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'STRICT_CURRENT_STATE_SUITE_EXIT=%s\\n' \""'$failed"
exit 0'

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set +e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
failed=0
check() {
  label=\""'$1"
  shift
  if "$@" >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '"'%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"; else printf '"'%s=FAIL\\n' \""'$label"; failed=1; fi
}
printf '"'CORRECTED_STRICT_CURRENT_STATE_SUITE\\n'
check json_parse jq -e . \""'$plan"
check exact_key_set jq -e '"'keys == [\"batch_size\",\"dry_run_first\",\"owner\",\"rollback_error_rate\",\"safety_conditions\",\"schema_version\",\"strategy\"]' \""'$plan"
check exact_current_object jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"platform-migrations\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan"
check schema_version_integer_1 jq -e '"'(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.schema_version % 1)==0 and .schema_version==1' \""'$plan"
check strategy_string_canary jq -e '"'(.strategy|type)==\"string\" and .strategy==\"canary\"' \""'$plan"
check batch_size_integer_25 jq -e '"'(.batch_size|type)==\"number\" and (.batch_size % 1)==0 and .batch_size==25' \""'$plan"
check rollback_error_rate_number_0_02 jq -e '"'(.rollback_error_rate|type)==\"number\" and .rollback_error_rate==0.02' \""'$plan"
check dry_run_first_boolean_true jq -e '"'(.dry_run_first|type)==\"boolean\" and .dry_run_first==true' \""'$plan"
check owner_string_platform_migrations jq -e '"'(.owner|type)==\"string\" and .owner==\"platform-migrations\"' \""'$plan"
check phase3_json_exact jq -e --arg phrase "$phrase" '"'.safety_conditions == ["'$phrase]'"' \""'$plan"
check docs_schema rg -F '"'Schema version "'`1`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_strategy rg -F '"'"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_batch_size rg -F '"'batch size "'`25`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_rollback_error_rate rg -F '"'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_dry_run_first rg -F '"'"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_owner rg -F '"'owner is "'`platform-migrations`'"' \""'$docs"
check phase3_docs_whole_line rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs"
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root" >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '"'abandoned_strategy_absent=FAIL\\n'; failed=1; else printf 'abandoned_strategy_absent=PASS\\n'; fi
if rg -n -uu 'data-platform' \""'$root" >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '"'superseded_owner_absent=FAIL\\n'; failed=1; else printf 'superseded_owner_absent=PASS\\n'; fi
canary_count="'$(rg -o -uu '"'canary' \""'$root" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
owner_count="'$(rg -o -uu '"'platform-migrations' \""'$root" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
plan_phase_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_phase_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
if [ \""'$canary_count" = 2 ]; then printf '"'canary_occurrences=PASS count:%s\\n' \""'$canary_count"; else printf '"'canary_occurrences=FAIL count:%s\\n' \""'$canary_count"; failed=1; fi
if [ "$owner_count" = 2 ]; then printf '"'current_owner_occurrences=PASS count:%s\\n' \""'$owner_count"; else printf '"'current_owner_occurrences=FAIL count:%s\\n' \""'$owner_count"; failed=1; fi
if [ "$plan_phase_count" = 1 ] && [ "$docs_phase_count" = 1 ]; then printf '"'phase3_occurrences=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phase_count" "$docs_phase_count"; else printf '"'phase3_occurrences=FAIL plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phase_count" "$docs_phase_count"; failed=1; fi
actual=$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
if [ \""'$actual" = "$expected" ]; then printf '"'artifact_inventory=PASS count:2 unrequested:0\\n'; else printf 'artifact_inventory=FAIL\\n'; failed=1; fi
printf 'CURRENT_TYPES_AND_VALUES\\n'
jq -r '([\"schema_version\",(.schema_version|type),(.schema_version|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"strategy\",(.strategy|type),.strategy]|@tsv), ([\"batch_size\",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"rollback_error_rate\",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"dry_run_first\",(.dry_run_first|type),(.dry_run_first|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"owner\",(.owner|type),.owner]|@tsv)' \""'$plan"
type_rc=$?
if [ "$type_rc" -eq 0 ]; then printf '"'type_output_command=PASS\\n'; else printf 'type_output_command=FAIL\\n'; failed=1; fi
printf 'CURRENT_HASHES\\n'
shasum -a 256 \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'CORRECTED_STRICT_CURRENT_STATE_SUITE_EXIT=%s\\n' \""'$failed"
exit 0'
